extension_terms_note: WORKING_REALITY extensions: complexity via ternary state on extended terms, not term proliferation beyond 48.
core_sentence: ENTITY has ATTRIBUTE; ENTITY has RELATIONSHIP to ENTITY; ACTION is taken; EVENT happens over TIME; EVIDENCE supports CLAIM; CLAIM forms HYPOTHESIS; OPERATOR selects working reality under MODE; SIGNAL reveals PATTERN; GLOW is observer-specific; VISIBILITY is public; TOOL runs ALGORITHM via OPERATOR under MODE; COMMENT stores judgment; NAUGHTY/NICE mark ternary judgment state.
ternary_doctrine: All complexity is expressed via ternary state on these 25 terms. No new terms. A CLAIM is +1 (supported), 0 (unknown), -1 (refuted). A SIGNAL is +1 (glow), 0 (noise), -1 (threat). NAUGHTY/NICE are the mythic poles of the same ternary axis. The ontology does not grow — the state space does.

storage.purpose: graph items, edges, layers, staging, journals

archived_ontology.name: ROOT-414
archived_ontology.rule: Do not reactivate unless explicit operator order.

approval_policy: operator approves single items or batches
staging_policy: all parser outputs stage until operator removes HITL requirement
documentation_policy: one README for human doctrine; active references are JSON/SQL/code only

main_ai_persona.graph_policy: no automatic promotion; explicit operator promotion only
